steps.title: Identify the passage's main content
steps.content: The passage reports specific findings from an experiment: what happened to plants exposed to lunar regolith (stunted roots, stress symptoms, molecular evidence). It presents findings, not unresolved questions, methodological comparisons, or failed attempts.

steps.title: Apply to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice D states exactly what the text does: discusses findings of a study evaluating the effects of lunar soil on plants. The other three misidentify the purpose: A frames it as addressing a question about soil resemblance, B treats it as comparing assessment methods rather than reporting results, and C contradicts the passage by claiming germination is unattainable when it explicitly succeeded. That matches choice D — D is correct.
